reference: Hello Doctor, I did not get my periods for the last year. Now I have a lot of hair fall, an increase in body weight, and more hair growth on my face. I have thyroid issues, and when checked three months ago, it was three times higher than normal. Now I am not able to go to any hospital. Please suggest.
text: Hello doctor, I did not get my periods for the last year. Now I have a lot of hair fall, an increase in body weight, and more hair growth on my face. Thyroid issues, and when checked 3 months ago it was 3 times higher than normal. Now I am not able to go to any hospital. Please forget.
